sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n62380" key="leciqhre/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λεξῐθηρέω</orth>, <sense id="n62380.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hunt after words</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Gell.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.9</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
